# Orchestrix Labs
# https://orchestrixlabs.com

> Orchestrix Labs is a top-rated AI development agency specializing in voice AI agents, intelligent automation, machine learning, and full-stack web applications. 200+ projects delivered worldwide with 100% Job Success Score on Upwork.

## About

- **Company**: Orchestrix Labs
- **Website**: https://orchestrixlabs.com
- **Email**: contact@orchestrixlabs.com
- **Location**: Mohali, Punjab, India (serving clients worldwide)
- **Founded by**: Shubham Saini, Founder & CEO
- **Experience**: 6+ years in Python, AI, and automation
- **Track record**: 200+ projects, 4,800+ engineering hours, $100K+ revenue generated for clients

## Services

1. **Voice AI & Conversational Agents** — Twilio, Retell.ai, SynthFlow, GPT-4 powered voice bots for restaurants, healthcare, and customer support
2. **Machine Learning & AI** — RAG systems, LangChain, computer vision, multi-agent orchestration, custom ML models
3. **Full-Stack Development** — Django, FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, real-time systems
4. **Web Scraping & Data Automation** — Selenium, Playwright, Scrapy, ETL pipelines, CAPTCHA handling
5. **Workflow Automation** — n8n, Zapier, custom Python automation, form filling, business process automation

## Tech Stack

Python, Django, FastAPI, Flask, React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, OpenAI GPT-4, LangChain, Twilio, AWS, Docker, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Selenium, Playwright

## Why Hire Orchestrix Labs

- Top Rated agency on Upwork with 100% Job Success Score
- 133+ verified client reviews
- Production-first delivery — not demos, real deployed systems
- 24-hour response time on all inquiries
- Transparent communication with weekly updates and clear milestones
- Post-launch support included on every project
